name: WLF_GEN_AI_CONSUMER_CONFIG_VL
query: SELECT b.GEN_AI_CONSUMER_CONFIG_ID, b.OBJECT_TYPE, b.CONSUMER_IMPL_CLASS, tl.NAME , tl.DESCRIPTION , tl.LANGUAGE , tl.SOURCE_LANG , b.ENABLED_FLAG , b.CREATED_BY , b.CREATION_DATE , b.LAST_UPDATED_BY , b.LAST_UPDATE_DATE , b.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN , b.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER , b.MODULE_ID FROM WLF_GEN_AI_CONSUMER_CONFIG_B b, WLF_GEN_AI_CONSUMER_CONFIG_TL tl WHERE b.GEN_AI_CONSUMER_CONFIG_ID = tl.GEN_AI_CONSUMER_CONFIG_ID AND tl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
